member.name: T:EasyInI.IniData
member.summary: Represents a complete INI file: a collection of named sections plus a Global section for entries that appear before any [section] header.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniData.Global
member.summary: Gets the default section for keys declared before any [section] header.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniData.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Gets or creates the section with the given name. Section name lookup respects the case-sensitivity setting from parse options.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniData.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{System.String})
member.summary: Creates an IniData instance with the specified comparers.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniData.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an IniData with case-insensitive section and key names (default).

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniData.SectionCount
member.summary: Gets the number of sections (excluding Global).

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniData.Sections
member.summary: Returns all sections in file order (excluding Global).

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniData.ContainsSection(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether a named section exists.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniData.AddSection(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new section. Throws if a section with the same name already exists.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniData.AddOrGetSection(System.String)
member.summary: Gets an existing section or creates it if it does not exist.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniData.RemoveSection(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the specified section. Returns true if it was found and removed.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniData.Get``1(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Shortcut: gets a typed value from a section.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniData.Get``1(System.String,System.String,``0)
member.summary: Shortcut: gets a typed value with a default.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniData.Set(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Shortcut: sets a value in a section. Creates the section if it does not exist.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniData.Set(System.String,System.String,EasyInI.IniValue)
member.summary: Shortcut: sets an IniValue in a section. Creates the section if it does not exist.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniData.ToString
member.summary: Serializes the entire IniData to INI text, preserving comments and entry order.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniData.WriteTo(System.IO.TextWriter)
member.summary: Writes the INI content to the given TextWriter.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniData.Save(System.String)
member.summary: Saves the INI content to a file.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniData.Save(System.String,System.Text.Encoding)
member.summary: Saves the INI content to a file with the specified encoding.

member.name: T:EasyInI.IniEntry
member.summary: Represents a single key=value entry within an INI section, along with its associated comments.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniEntry.Key
member.summary: Gets the key name.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniEntry.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the entry value.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniEntry.LeadingComments
member.summary: Comment lines appearing before this entry. Each element is one comment line without the leading ';' or '#'.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniEntry.InlineComment
member.summary: Comment appearing on the same line after the value, or null. Does not include the leading ';' or '#'.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniEntry.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an entry with the specified key and string value.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniEntry.#ctor(System.String,EasyInI.IniValue)
member.summary: Creates an entry with the specified key and IniValue.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniEntry.ToString
member.summary: Returns "key=value".

member.name: T:EasyInI.DuplicateKeyBehavior
member.summary: Specifies how to handle duplicate keys within a section during parsing.

member.name: F:EasyInI.DuplicateKeyBehavior.Overwrite
member.summary: The last occurrence of a key overwrites earlier ones.

member.name: F:EasyInI.DuplicateKeyBehavior.Throw
member.summary: A duplicate key causes a parse exception.

member.name: F:EasyInI.DuplicateKeyBehavior.Ignore
member.summary: The first occurrence is kept; later duplicates are ignored.

member.name: T:EasyInI.IniParseOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for INI parsing and serialization behavior.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniParseOptions.CaseSensitive
member.summary: Gets or sets whether section and key names are case-sensitive. Default: false (case-insensitive).

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniParseOptions.DuplicateKeyBehavior
member.summary: Gets or sets how duplicate keys within a section are handled. Default: Overwrite.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniParseOptions.AllowQuotedValues
member.summary: Gets or sets whether values wrapped in double quotes have their quotes stripped during parsing. Default: true.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniParseOptions.TrimWhitespace
member.summary: Gets or sets whether leading and trailing whitespace is trimmed from keys and unquoted values. Default: true.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniParseOptions.Default
member.summary: Gets the default parse options (case-insensitive, overwrite duplicates, allow quotes, trim whitespace).

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniParseOptions.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new instance with default values.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniParseOptions.GetKeyComparer
member.summary: Returns the string comparer implied by CaseSensitive setting.

member.name: T:EasyInI.IniParser
member.summary: Static parser for INI text and files. Produces IniData with comment and format preservation.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniParser.Parse(System.String,EasyInI.IniParseOptions)
member.summary: Parses an INI string into an IniData object.
member.param: Parse options, or null for defaults.
member.exception: Thrown when the INI text is malformed or when DuplicateKeyBehavior is Throw and a duplicate is encountered.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses an INI string using default options.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniParser.ParseFile(System.String,EasyInI.IniParseOptions)
member.summary: Parses an INI file into an IniData object.
member.param: Parse options, or null for defaults.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniParser.ParseFile(System.String)
member.summary: Parses an INI file using default options.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniParser.TryParse(System.String,EasyInI.IniData@,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to parse an INI string. Returns false on failure and sets the error message in .

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniParser.TryParse(System.String,EasyInI.IniParseOptions,EasyInI.IniData@,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to parse an INI string with the given options.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniParser.FindCommentStart(System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Finds the start of a comment (; or #) outside of quotes within text. Returns the index of the comment character, or -1 if none found.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniParser.IsQuoted(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the value is wrapped in double quotes.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniParser.Unquote(System.String)
member.summary: Removes surrounding quotes and unescapes doubled quotes.

member.name: T:EasyInI.IniParseException
member.summary: Exception thrown when INI parsing fails.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniParseException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an IniParseException with a message.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniParseException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Creates an IniParseException with a message and inner exception.

member.name: T:EasyInI.IniPropertyAttribute
member.summary: Maps a class property to an INI key. Optionally specifies the target section name.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniPropertyAttribute.Name
member.summary: Gets the INI key name that this property maps to.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniPropertyAttribute.Section
member.summary: Gets or sets the INI section name for this property. If not set, the section from on the class is used, or the class name itself as a fallback.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniPropertyAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Maps a property to an INI key with the given name.

member.name: T:EasyInI.IniSectionAttribute
member.summary: Specifies the default INI section name for a class when none is specified on individual properties.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniSectionAttribute.Name
member.summary: Gets the section name.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniSectionAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the default section for all properties in this class.

member.name: T:EasyInI.IniSection
member.summary: Represents an INI section: [SectionName] followed by key=value entries. Entries are ordered as they appear in the file.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniSection.Name
member.summary: Gets the section name (without brackets).

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniSection.LeadingComments
member.summary: Comment lines appearing before the [section] header. Each element is one comment line without the leading ';' or '#'.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniSection.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Gets or sets the entry value for the specified key. Setting a key that does not exist will add a new entry at the end.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniSection.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{System.String})
member.summary: Creates a section with the given name.
member.param: Key equality comparer for case sensitivity.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniSection.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a section with case-insensitive key lookup (default).

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniSection.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of entries in this section.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniSection.Entries
member.summary: Returns all entries in file order.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniSection.Keys
member.summary: Returns all keys in file order.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniSection.GetEntry(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the IniEntry for the specified key, or null if not found.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniSection.ContainsKey(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether a key exists in this section.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniSection.GetValueOrDefault(System.String,EasyInI.IniValue)
member.summary: Gets a value by key, returning the specified default if the key is not found.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniSection.Get``1(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a typed value by key. Throws KeyNotFoundException if the key does not exist.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniSection.Get``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Gets a typed value by key, returning the specified default if not found or conversion fails.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniSection.Set(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets a key to a string value. Creates the key if it does not exist. Returns the IniEntry that was created or updated.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniSection.Set(System.String,EasyInI.IniValue)
member.summary: Sets a key to an IniValue. Creates the key if it does not exist. Returns the IniEntry that was created or updated.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniSection.Remove(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the entry with the specified key. Returns true if the entry was found and removed.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniSection.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Returns an enumerator over entries in file order.

member.name: T:EasyInI.IniSerializer
member.summary: Provides generic serialization and deserialization between POCO objects and IniData.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniSerializer.Deserialize``1(EasyInI.IniData)
member.summary: Deserializes an IniData instance into a new object of type T. Only properties marked with are mapped.
member.typeparam: The target type. Must have a parameterless constructor.
member.returns: A new instance of T populated from the INI data.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniSerializer.Deserialize``1(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes an INI string directly into an object of type T.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniSerializer.Serialize``1(``0)
member.summary: Serializes an object into an IniData instance. Properties are grouped into sections based on their or the class-level .

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniSerializer.SerializeToString``1(``0)
member.summary: Serializes an object directly to an INI string.

member.name: T:EasyInI.IniValue
member.summary: Wraps an INI value string and provides type conversion.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniValue.Value
member.summary: Gets the raw string value, or null if this instance represents no value.

member.name: P:EasyInI.IniValue.HasValue
member.summary: Gets whether this instance holds a non-null value.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniValue.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an IniValue wrapping the given string.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniValue.Get``1
member.summary: Converts the value to the specified type. Throws InvalidCastException if conversion fails.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniValue.Get``1(``0)
member.summary: Converts the value to the specified type, returning defaultValue on failure.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniValue.ToString
member.summary: Returns the raw string value or the default string if null.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniValue.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns the hash code of the underlying value.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniValue.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Two IniValue instances are equal if their raw values are equal.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniValue.Equals(EasyInI.IniValue)
member.summary: Two IniValue instances are equal if their raw values are equal.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniValue.op_Implicit(EasyInI.IniValue)~System.String
member.summary: Implicitly converts the IniValue to its raw string.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniValue.op_Implicit(System.String)~EasyInI.IniValue
member.summary: Implicitly converts a string to an IniValue.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniValue.op_Implicit(EasyInI.IniValue)~System.Int32
member.summary: Implicitly converts the IniValue to an int.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniValue.op_Implicit(EasyInI.IniValue)~System.Boolean
member.summary: Implicitly converts the IniValue to a bool.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniValue.op_Implicit(EasyInI.IniValue)~System.Double
member.summary: Implicitly converts the IniValue to a double.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniValue.op_Equality(EasyInI.IniValue,EasyInI.IniValue)
member.summary: Returns true if two IniValue instances are equal.

member.name: M:EasyInI.IniValue.op_Inequality(EasyInI.IniValue,EasyInI.IniValue)
member.summary: Returns true if two IniValue instances are not equal.
